name: @block-agent/app-task_proxy
description: task_proxy BlockApp: projects the external Task service into agent context (kanban / my-tasks). The HTTP/WS Task-service client is isolated here; @block-agent/core never imports it.
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build). Importers use '@block-agent/app-task_proxy/manifest.js'. Same wildcard subpath discipline as app-task / app-memory_letta; tsx runs the source directly via the workspace symlink.

blockAgent.summary: 对接外部 Task 服务，渲染任务看板 / 我的任务；提供 task_count 契约，消费 org_directory。
